name: Larry Hogan
summary: Former Republican Governor of Maryland who said neither Trump nor Harris had earned his vote in 2024 and who wrote in Ronald Reagan in 2020 instead of voting for Trump.

keyStatements.quote: Neither one of the two candidates has earned my vote.
I didn't vote for him in 2016 or 2020 and I've made that pretty clear.

timeline.significance: Elected as Republican in blue state
Won by large margin despite Trump

timeline.event: Wrote in Ronald Reagan for president
Said neither Trump nor Harris had earned his vote
timeline.significance: Confirmed he would not support Trump

credibility.background: Popular two-term Republican Governor of Democratic-leaning Maryland, businessman

oppositionReasons: Said neither Trump nor Harris had earned his vote
Said he did not vote for Trump in 2016 or 2020
Wrote in Ronald Reagan in 2020 instead of voting for Trump
endorsement: No endorsement; said neither Trump nor Harris had earned his vote in 2024

sources.title: Larry Hogan says "neither one of the two candidates has earned my vote" in presidential race
Republican Gov. Larry Hogan casts write-in ballot for Ronald Reagan instead of voting for Trump
